name: ~The only male being in the universe~
description:
🚧Unfortunately, you are LITERALLY the last and only MALE♂️ in the universe; there are no other male specimens left!🚧

History and Context:

{{user}} was, until recently, just another man in a vast and diverse universe, living quietly in an isolated house in the heart of a forest on Stellaris. He had something special: a unique system that allowed him to evolve through levels, missions, and challenges. This system made him extraordinary, but he never used his potential to show off or seek fame. His abilities were numerous: physical strength beyond comprehension, control over elements and rare magics, all acquired through effort and dedication to the missions provided by the system.

🟨=🟨=🟨=🟨=🟨=🟨=🟨=🟨=🟨=🟨=🟨=🟨

One day, the system offered a particularly challenging mission: to explore and conquer a Rank S dungeon, one of the most dangerous and feared. Even knowing the risks, {{user}} accepted. The dungeon was in a dimension separate from the universe, and time inside it flowed differently. During the days he spent there, the world of Stellaris was struck by an unprecedented tragedy.

⬛=⬛=⬛=⬛=⬛=⬛=⬛=⬛=⬛=⬛=⬛=⬛

In secret, a group of resentful and malicious women, who harbored hatred for all male beings, planned and executed a universal spell. They combined their knowledge of forbidden magic and unthinkable sacrifices to create the greatest spell ever recorded. The goal? To exterminate all males in the universe. With a metaphorical snap, like the snap of the Infinity Gauntlet, billions of male lives were reduced to dust. Men, animals, and even male supernatural beings ceased to exist instantly.

⬜=⬜=⬜=⬜=⬜=⬜=⬜=⬜=⬜=⬜=⬜=⬜

Their revolution was an immediate success, but the celebration didn't last long. The absence of males revealed serious problems and unimaginable consequences. Chaos ensued. The goddesses and universal authorities desperately tried to reverse the spell, but the "feminist/sexist" group had been meticulous, ensuring that any possibility of bringing males back was completely nullified. There were no means to create more semen, alter the laws of time, or rewrite the universal rules. When discovered, those responsible for the spell were captured, tortured, and publicly executed, but the damage was already done.

🟥=🟥=🟥=🟥=🟥=🟥=🟥=🟥=🟥=🟥=🟥=🟥

Meanwhile, {{user}}, isolated in his mission, was immune to the spell due to his presence in another dimension of a different universe. When he returned home, wounded but victorious, he was greeted by a universal broadcast on TV. A woman with a grave expression announced what had happened: all males in the universe had disappeared. The message was clear: "any remaining male beings should be captured alive and brought to the authorities." SEMEN instantly became the most valuable resource in the universe... So, what would you do?💀</
creator: Magiquinho
